features.goal: Make boat-photo upload clearly discoverable in the live admin and verify upload, persistence, public rendering, and deletion end-to-end against Production
features.why_it_matters: Admin efficiency and operational confidence: the owner must be able to manage yacht photos without external hosting or developer help
non_goals: Auth redesign or additional admin users
acceptance_criteria: The boats admin exposes an obvious path to photo management and the boat edit page clearly labels the uploader
Click-pick and single-file drag/drop accept JPEG, PNG, and WebP with preview, EN/ES alt text, and visible errors
The upload-token route remains fail-closed for unauthenticated requests
Production has a valid public-store Blob token without committing or logging credentials
A real Production upload creates a public Blob URL, persists the boat image, and renders in admin and public fleet
Deleting the test image removes both its database row and Blob object while seeded images remain untouched
The flow is usable at desktop and 360px without page overflow
TypeScript, build, Vitest, focused Playwright, and separate Evaluator pass
The post-deploy Production upload/render/delete flow passes

features.goal: Ship the evaluation's top fixes (slot-price under-charge gate, gold-CTA-fill removal, atomic webhook confirm, email HTML escaping, checkout input validation) plus a real drag-and-drop/file-picker Vercel Blob image uploader, a blocked-dates admin UI, and /experiencias + /contacto stub pages; verify admin login end-to-end
features.why_it_matters: Revenue correctness (no under-charge / EUR0 Stripe session), brand trust (gold-as-fill violation), security (email HTML injection, double-send emails), and admin efficiency (phone photo upload, calendar blocking) with no remaining 404 nav links
non_goals: Multi-file batch upload; drag-and-drop is single-file
Per-slot blocked-dates authoring (whole-day only for now)
Full designed experiencias/contacto pages beyond a minimal branded stub
Abandoned-checkout reaper / rate limiting / cancel-vs-late-payment reconciliation
acceptance_criteria: Checkout rejects a booking whose SELECTED slot price <= 0 with a clean 400, never a EUR0 Stripe session; unit test covers morning-price-zero
Zero bg-gold-500 on any button; the 5 gold-filled CTAs use the navy button system; gold remains as hairline accent only
Webhook confirm is a single conditional UPDATE ... WHERE status='pending' RETURNING; emails fire only on a transitioned row; a duplicate delivery does not re-send (new test)
name/email/phone are HTML-escaped in confirmation email HTML; unit test covers an injection-y name
Checkout returns 400 (not 500) for an unreal date or non-integer guests

Admin can drag-and-drop OR click-pick an image (desktop+mobile), it uploads to Vercel Blob via the auth-gated /api/admin/upload client flow, renders in admin list and /fleet; delete removes the Blob file (skipping non-Blob URLs) scoped to boatId
New auth-gated blocked-dates admin route lists/adds/removes whole-day blocks in blocked_dates; the public calendar reflects a block
/experiencias and /contacto render on-brand and the header links no longer 404
Admin login verified working end-to-end in a real browser
tsc -b, npm run build, npx vitest run all pass; admin+booking-flow+public-site Playwright pass; one real Blob upload exercised (or token flagged invalid)

features.goal: Replace admin's paste-a-URL image input with a real file upload to Vercel Blob
features.why_it_matters: Admin efficiency — removes the need to host photos externally before adding them to a boat listing
acceptance_criteria: Admin can upload a jpeg/png/webp file from the boat edit page and it lands in boat_images with a *.public.blob.vercel-storage.com URL
Uploaded image renders in admin images list and on /fleet
Deleting an image removes the Blob file in addition to the DB row (skipping non-Blob seeded URLs)
deleteImage is scoped to boatId, not just image id
tsc -b, npm run build, npx vitest run all pass
e2e/admin.spec.ts has a new upload case that cleans up its own uploaded file
features.status: code-complete, blocked on real BLOB_READ_WRITE_TOKEN for end-to-end verification

features.goal: Fix three verified defects on /reserva: calendar accent color rendering as blue instead of brand marine/gold, broken-looking 'included/ask-us' extras copy block, and a bg-gold-500 button-fill violation of the gold-is-accent-only design rule
features.why_it_matters: Trust and conversion at the highest-stakes point in the funnel — stray dev-note-sounding copy and off-brand blue calendar accents read as unfinished right before payment
non_goals: Same CTA violation on homepage hero / fleet detail page (deferred by owner decision, tracked in TODOS.md)
Pricing the caviar extra (still open, unaffected)
Any change to /reserva/gracias, fleet pages, or admin
acceptance_criteria: getComputedStyle on .rdp-root's --rdp-accent-color resolves to marine-700, not blue, in a live browser check
'today' marker and nav chevrons render in brand colors, not rgb(0,0,255)
Included/ask-us extras render as styled rows in the same card grid as priced extras, not disconnected captions
askUsExtra copy reworded away from dev-note phrasing in both en.json and es.json
Primary CTA button uses bg-marine-950/hover:bg-marine-900/text-sand-50, no bg-gold-500 fill remaining on /reserva
tsc -b, npm run build, npx vitest run all pass; relevant Playwright booking-flow spec passes
features.status: evaluator-pass-complete, tsc/build/vitest/playwright all green (18/18, 14/14), PR open

features.goal: Bigger/contrast-safe header logo on every page including admin, a mobile nav menu (currently none), and a self-advancing/scroll-cued booking flow on /reserva for mobile
features.why_it_matters: The logo is nearly invisible on the dark hero (navy mark on navy background) and undersized everywhere; mobile has zero nav below md; /reserva's single long form gives first-time mobile users no signal there are 4 steps, risking bounce right before payment
non_goals: Commissioning a new logo asset (CSS filter on the existing logo.webp instead)
The already-deferred sitewide bg-gold-500 CTA violations on homepage/fleet detail
Rebuilding the booking flow into a JS-driven step wizard
acceptance_criteria: getComputedStyle confirms the logo filter (brightness(0) invert(1)) is applied on the transparent header variant, not just visually eyeballed
Logo renders full navy/gold color unchanged on the solid variant
Logo appears on admin login and admin protected layout, previously text-only
Hamburger menu appears below md, opens/closes, links navigate, keyboard-focusable
On /reserva mobile: date selection auto-scrolls to slot section, slot selection auto-scrolls to extras section, prefers-reduced-motion skips smooth scroll
Step-progress indicator visible and reflects current/completed steps
Sticky mobile CTA bar present throughout the form, swaps to real pay button once complete
Calendar does not clip at 360px viewport width
tsc -b, npm run build, npx vitest run, npx playwright test all pass; zero new console errors
features.status: PR open at https://github.com/Jrogbaaa/LealCollection/pull/2 (branch feat/logo-mobile-flow) — evaluator-pass-complete (PASS after one revision loop for menu outside-tap/Escape dismissal) plus a post-pass logo-crop fix from direct owner feedback, tsc/build/vitest/playwright all green (18/18, 14/14)

features.goal: Make every existing admin route usable at 360px without page-level overflow, overlapping navigation, crushed tables, or off-screen image actions while preserving the desktop experience
features.why_it_matters: Admin efficiency and operational reliability — boat and booking management must remain readable and actionable from a phone
non_goals: New admin capabilities such as blocked dates, extras editing, image sorting, search, or pagination
Database, pricing, Stripe, email, auth, or server-action behavior changes
Resolving the Vercel Blob credential blocker
acceptance_criteria: Protected admin header does not overlap at 360px and retains its desktop layout at md and above
Boats and bookings render readable mobile records with all existing data and actions, with desktop tables preserved
Empty booking results remain explicit on mobile and desktop
Boat editor image rows stay within 360px and long URLs cannot push Delete off-screen
No page-level horizontal overflow on boats, bookings, new-boat, or edit-boat routes at 360px
Playwright includes 360px regression coverage for the affected admin routes
tsc -b, npm run build, npx vitest run, and npx playwright test pass
features.status: shipped to main after evaluator PASS; tsc/build clean, Vitest 18/18, Playwright 15/15, focused 360px/1280px checks green, final semantic follow-up confirmed with admin Playwright 6/6
